TEXT.source: NTU Paiwan Data, Participant Maron, file the man who killed typhoon_Maron

S.FORM: ay izua za lin linadengan a a milingan a matucu lja
S.PHON: aj izua za ɭin ɭinadəŋan a a miɭiŋan a matuʦu ʎa
